title: PurpleFade x64
description: PurpleFade pvp x64 resource pack on 1.8.9
body:
🌌 Purple Fade PvP [x64]
Boost your performance and aesthetics with the Blue/Purple Fade pack. Designed for competitive play, this pack combines a sleek galaxy-themed gradient with ultra-lightweight textures for maximum FPS.

⚡ Key Features
x6 Resolution: Ultra-optimized for peak FPS on any hardware.

PvP Essentials: Short swords, low fire, and transparent UI for better visibility.

Aesthetic Fade: Stunning Blue-to-Purple gradients on all weapons and armor.

Clean Visuals: Clear glass and minimal particles to keep your focus on the fight
